headline: GPT-5.6 Sol Pro tackles 30-year optimization problem with AI
body: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol Pro has solved a long-standing convex optimization problem that researchers have worked on for three decades, demonstrating a significant leap in mathematical reasoning capabilities. For healthcare AI, this matters because optimization algorithms underpin critical infrastructure: EHR scheduling systems, resource allocation in value-based care networks, and supply chain logistics for hospital operations. The ability to solve previously intractable mathematical problems opens pathways for more sophisticated predictive models in clinical workflows and personalized treatment optimization. Healthcare organizations and AI vendors should monitor whether these advances translate into practical tools for operational efficiency and clinical decision support.
